# VLM reasons from image space, not pre-encoded coordinates

`NEED-visual-grounding`

| kind | status |
|---|---|
| need | draft |

The VLM must identify features and navigation targets by reading the map image, not by recalling coordinate math that small models perform unreliably. This drives the pixel-coordinate output schema and the prompt design that strips named landmarks and coordinate answer keys.
